summary: Dark, shaky first-person and body-cam footage of a nighttime enforcement operation in Portland, Oregon: agents moving through yards in near-darkness with flashlight glare, then detaining people outside a house. The tweet describes it as a 'first person view of targeted enforcement.' There is no music.
notable_text: Tweet: 'Follow along in this first person view of targeted enforcement... Self deport now or you may find yourself on the other side of the camera.'
